Input:TestDriveId.title: TestDriveId
Input:TestDriveId.description:
The Salesforce ID of the test drive record. 
Pass this when Type is TestDrive. 
Leave empty for other types.

Input:Vehicle_Model_Number.title: Vehicle Model Number
Input:Vehicle_Model_Number.description:
The model number of the vehicle. 
Pass this when Type is Vehicle. 
Leave empty for other types.

Input:Type.title: Type
Input:Type.description:
The type of review summary to generate. 
Pass Dealer for dealer reviews. 
Pass Vehicle for vehicle reviews. 
Pass TestDrive for test drive reviews.

Input:AccountId.title: AccountId
Input:AccountId.description:
The Salesforce Account ID of the dealer. 
Pass this when Type is Dealer. 
Leave empty for other types.

isPreviewOnly.title: Preview Only
isPreviewOnly.description: Resolves the prompt template without generating an LLM response.
